word: H3363 - יָקַע - yâqaʻ - yaw-kah' - Be alienated

sections.paragraph:
Original: יקע

Transliteration: yâqa‛

Phonetic: yaw-kah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be dislocated, be alienated
    1. (Qal) to be dislocated, be torn away, be alienated
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to execute slowly (by exposure or impalation)
      2. to hang
    3. (Hophal) to be executed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 903

Part(s) of speech: Verb
